name: clinpub
description: End-to-end clinical data analysis and publication pipeline for SCI Q1/Q2 journals. Reads CSV/XLSX data, runs R-based statistical analysis, generates publication-grade figures, searches literature (PubMed), writes IMRAD manuscripts, and simulates peer review.

interface.longDescription: ClinPub is a structured clinical data analysis and publication pipeline that acts as a senior medical statistician and academic writing consultant. It processes patient-level data through 5 phases to produce publication-ready manuscripts targeting SCI Q1/Q2 journals.
interface.shortDescription: End-to-end clinical data analysis and publication pipeline for SCI Q1/Q2 journals.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me analyze clinical data and write a publication.
